original_question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: Aria, Chloe, Jacob, and Penelope. Aria expressed that Chloe is a knave and Jacob is a knight. Chloe stated, "Aria is not a knave". According to Jacob, "If Chloe is a knave then Chloe is a knight". Penelope remarked, "Chloe is a knight if and only if Jacob is a knave". So who is a knight and who is a knave?
